## Methodology

1. Connected to MySQL as root on localhost:3306
2. Searched databases: vb_shared, vb_code_test, CODEBASE, vbstyle_documents
3. For each table, searched all TEXT/VARCHAR/CHAR columns
4. Search terms: MemUnit, memunit, MEMUNIT, Memunit, Core_MainUnit, core_memunit, CORE_MEMUNIT
5. Extracted file paths from matching rows using regex
6. Deduplicated results and grouped by database.table
7. Saved to this .md file
